codeReview.summary: The refactor successfully extracted shared mocks and updated two App navigation test suites, but it does not satisfy the feature contract requiring all three App*.test.tsx files to consume shared scaffolding from fixtures.ts.

issues.description: Feature expectedBehavior requires all three App*.test.tsx suites to import shared scaffolding, but this file still defines its own duplicated vi.hoisted mock block (and local tauri/FileSelector mocks at lines 29 and 46) instead of importing shared fixtures.

Feature contract explicitly targets frontend/src/test/fixtures.ts and imports from fixtures.ts, but implementation created fixtures.tsx and consumers import './test/fixtures.tsx' instead (e.g., App.file-selection-navigation.test.tsx:4, App.results-navigation.test.tsx:4).

sharedStateObservations.observation: frontend-worker's TDD procedure is too rigid for pure test-fixture dedup features; worker explicitly deviated from mandatory red-first flow and validated via existing targeted tests.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md:30-31 mandates failing-test-first; handoff reports skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false with deviation on '3. Red → Green TDD' in mission handoff JSON lines 66-69.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared-state guidance hardcodes fixtures.ts, but worker produced fixtures.tsx to host JSX mock components, indicating ambiguity in the convention for test fixture extension.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md:39 says shared scaffolding lives in frontend/src/test/fixtures.ts, while implemented file path is frontend/src/test/fixtures.tsx and imports at App.file-selection-navigation.test.tsx:4 and App.results-navigation.test.tsx:4.

summary: Review failed: commit 4b36e00 extracts reusable mocks but leaves App.saved-result-ux.test.tsx unhoisted and does not meet the explicit fixtures.ts path/usage contract.
